response:
当然可以！以下是去除所有个人身份信息（PII）后的查询版本，并保留了原意和意图：

---

I sent an English email invitation yesterday, offering two time options for them to choose which training session they would like to attend. Could you help me write an English email based on this background? Thank you for your reply yesterday. We will be holding the Compliance System Training on today at 6:00 PM and 4:00 PM to 5:00 PM on Teams. The training will be conducted in English. We hope you can attend on time. Thank you.

---

如果你需要我根据这个背景帮你写一封英文的邀请邮件，我也可以帮你完成。请告诉我是否需要。
